title: calylophus nuttallii
intro: Calylophus nuttallii, also known as Nuttall's sandverbena or Nuttall's calylophus, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, primarily for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Calylophus nuttallii include soothing wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal usage.
